description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a clean, rectangular structure and a minimalist aesthetic. The building is primarily white with large windows distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing for ample natural light. A paved pathway lined with several medium-sized trees leads from the main entrance to a detached carport, which is open on all sides and shelters two vehicles. The bungalow includes an outdoor patio area and a small balcony, enhancing its residential comfort. The exterior walls appear to be made of concrete or stucco, and the overall layout is open and spacious. The property is surrounded by greenery, providing a pleasant urban retreat.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large windows, a tree-lined path, and a detached carport. The structure is minimalist and surrounded by greenery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main building, tree-lined path, and detached carport with vehicles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the carport, entrance path, and main entry to the bungalow.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the carport, trees, and the rear of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, patio area, and part of the interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
